Game.Name: Super Star Wars - Jedi no Fukushuu (Japan)
Game.plot: Join the Rebellion and crush the Death Star in a giant 16-meg universe filled with all the action and adventure of the Star Wars® finale. The command of five different characters-- from Wicket the Ewok to Princess Leia--and go up against the Empire's worst, from Jabba the Hutt to the Emperor himself! This is it! You're going to need every ounce of Force you're got in you.Cheat: View Build DateTo view the date the game was built on, simply have a Super Scope plugged into the second controller port. The build date will be displayed at the bottom of the title screen.
